## Checklist

- [ ] I've tested the changes locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] New provider files follow the existing pattern (`callX` + `streamX` exports)
- [ ] No API keys or personal data are hardcoded
- [ ] PR title is concise (under 72 characters)
